data.title: System Research Co., Ltd. Completes Share Distribution, Alters Major Shareholders
data.description:
System Research Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3771) ) has provided an announcement.

System Research Co., Ltd. has completed an off-floor distribution of 800,000 shares, resulting in a change in its major shareholders. This move, aimed at improving share distribution and liquidity, led to Toshiyuki Yamada no longer being the largest shareholder, with his voting rights dropping from 14.39% to 9.57%. The company states that this change will not impact its financial results.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:3771) stock is a Buy with a Yen2553.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on System Research Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:3771 Stock Forecast page.

More about System Research Co., Ltd.

System Research Co., Ltd. operates in the technology sector, focusing on the distribution and liquidity of its shares. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and the Nagoya Stock Exchange Premier Market.

Average Trading Volume: 52,347

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen35.49B

data.title: Lakes Blue Energy Updates on Wombat-5 Drilling Progress
data.description:
Lakes Blue Energy NL ( (AU:LKO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Lakes Blue Energy NL has provided an update on its drilling operations at the Wombat-5 well in the Gippsland Basin, Victoria. The well has reached a depth of 3,052 meters, with a horizontal length of 1,500 meters, and is currently in the Strzelecki Formation. The company is preparing for further operations to address the bottomhole assembly, which could impact future drilling activities and resource extraction in the region.

More about Lakes Blue Energy NL

Lakes Blue Energy NL operates in the energy sector, focusing on the exploration and development of oil and gas resources. The company is engaged in drilling operations and aims to harness energy resources in the Gippsland Basin, Victoria.

Average Trading Volume: 262,715

Current Market Cap: A$94.03M

data.title: American Uranium Advances Lo Herma Project with New Drilling Approval
data.description:
GTI Resources Ltd ( (AU:AMU) ) has shared an announcement.

American Uranium Limited has received approval from the State of Wyoming’s Land Quality Division for its resource expansion and infill drilling campaign at the Lo Herma Project. The first phase, set to begin in the fourth quarter of 2025, will focus on expanding the resource base by targeting extensions of known trends, aiming to increase the current mineral resource estimate. This development is expected to contribute to an updated Mineral Resource Estimate and Scoping Study in 2026, enhancing the company’s position in the nuclear energy sector.

More about GTI Resources Ltd

American Uranium Limited (ASX:AMU) is a company involved in the uranium mining industry, focusing on in-situ recovery (ISR) uranium projects in the United States. The company’s flagship project is the Lo Herma Project, which aims to capitalize on the revival of nuclear and uranium mining in America.

Average Trading Volume: 349,858

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$21.96M

data.title: Kinetiko Energy Achieves Strong Gas Flow in South Africa
data.description:
Kinetiko Energy Ltd. ( (AU:KKO) ) has shared an update.

Kinetiko Energy Ltd has reported successful results from its production test well 271-KA03PT10, achieving a strong gas flow of 92 Mscfd with a high methane content of 99%. This flow rate significantly exceeds the 50 Mscfd threshold deemed commercially viable by independent certifier Sproule B.V., enhancing the economic prospects of the Brakfontein cluster. The company is conducting further tests to determine sustained flow rates and depletion characteristics, with plans to connect this well to historic wells for a micro LNG pilot plant. The positive results support the commercial viability of the cluster and are expected to contribute to higher reserve estimates.

More about Kinetiko Energy Ltd.

Kinetiko Energy Ltd is an energy company focused on commercializing advanced shallow conventional gas projects in South Africa’s Mpumalanga Province. The company is working on developing an energy solution for the region, with a market focus on supplying gas to a planned micro LNG pilot plant.

Average Trading Volume: 284,236

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$116.9M

Find detailed analytics on KKO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: ES-CON JAPAN Extends Syndicated Loan Term Amid Project Schedule Revision
data.description:
An update from ES-CON JAPAN Ltd. ( (JP:8892) ) is now available.

ES-CON JAPAN Ltd. has announced an extension of the borrowing term for a syndicated loan from September 2025 to March 2026. This decision was made to accommodate a revised project schedule, and the company plans to refinance the loan with long-term financing before the new maturity date. The extension does not affect the company’s full-year performance forecast for the fiscal year ending March 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8892) stock is a Hold with a Yen1094.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ES-CON JAPAN Ltd. stock, see the JP:8892 Stock Forecast page.

More about ES-CON JAPAN Ltd.

ES-CON JAPAN Ltd. operates in the real estate industry, focusing on project financing and development. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and is involved in securing and managing syndicated loans to support its projects.

data.title: Carnarvon Energy Completes Strategic Investment and Share Purchase Plan
data.description:
Carnarvon Energy Limited ( (AU:CVN) ) just unveiled an update.

Carnarvon Energy Limited, a company involved in strategic investments, has completed the second tranche of its strategic placement with Strike Energy Limited and a share purchase plan, raising approximately A$36 million. The funds will be used for various projects including the completion of the South Erregulla 85MW Project, upstream field development for West Erregulla, and exploration wells at Walyering West and Ocean Hill, as well as for working capital and general corporate purposes.

data.title: Greatland Resources Emphasizes Governance and Diversity in Latest Statement
data.description:
Greatland Resources ( (GB:GGP) ) just unveiled an update.

Greatland Resources Limited has released its Corporate Governance Statement, highlighting its commitment to high standards of corporate governance. The statement outlines the company’s compliance with the ASX Corporate Governance Principles and Recommendations, emphasizing the establishment of a Corporate Governance Charter and a Diversity and Inclusion Policy. The company has set measurable objectives for gender diversity, aiming to increase female representation in its workforce following the integration of employees from the Telfer-Havieron acquisition. This move reflects Greatland’s strategic efforts to enhance governance and diversity, potentially improving its industry positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Greatland Resources

Greatland Resources Limited operates in the resources industry, focusing on exploration and development projects. The company is involved in the mining sector, with a significant market focus on the Telfer-Havieron acquisition, which has led to a substantial increase in its workforce.

data.title: Powerhouse Ventures Expands Portfolio with Strategic Investments in Quantum and AI
data.description:
Powerhouse Ventures Ltd. ( (AU:PVL) ) has issued an update.

Powerhouse Ventures Limited has announced new investments in Veriquantix, a quantum-based cybersecurity firm, and Sirius-beta Labs, a company specializing in situated reasoning for commercial and national security applications. These investments are part of the company’s strategy to launch the Critical Infrastructure Opportunities Fund under the Burleigh Ventures brand, aimed at capitalizing on global mega trends in quantum, AI, and space technologies. The investments highlight PVL’s ability to secure early positions in significant technological advancements, potentially enhancing shareholder value and positioning the company as a key player in the critical infrastructure sector.

More about Powerhouse Ventures Ltd.

Powerhouse Ventures Limited (PVL) operates in the investment industry, focusing on cutting-edge technology sectors such as AI, quantum computing, and space technologies. The company is involved in incubating new and existing fund products and has a strategic focus on increasing shareholder returns through diversified market exposures.
